title: Contract Project Manager – Rail Infrastructure
description_raw:
Rullion are recruiting on behalf of a major rail contractor for an experienced Project Manager to join a high-profile track renewal programme in West Yorkshire. This is an outside IR35 contract assignment paying £700 per day.

The role will oversee GRIP Stage 5–8 delivery on a series of Network Rail-sponsored track renewal projects. You will manage a multi-disciplinary site team (P-Way trackwork, signalling, OLE), coordinate with NR’s sponsor and Programme Management Office, and drive programme performance against the delivery baseline.

Key requirements:
- Minimum 5 years’ project management experience in the rail sector
- PRINCE2 Practitioner or APM PMQ
- Familiar with NEC3/4 ECC and NR engineering procedures
- CSCS card (or equivalent rail site safety ticket)
- Previous GRIP Stage 5–8 delivery experience highly desirable

Contract: 6 months initially, likely to extend
Rate: £700 per day outside IR35
Start: 14 July 2026
Location: Leeds (occasional travel to NR York offices)
Security clearance: BPSS required
